content.verdict: Pegasus Suites & Spa delivers real caldera-front Santorini luxury at a noticeably gentler price than Oia. Set on the Imerovigli cliff with 24 suites — many genuine cave dwellings — it offers an infinity pool floating over the caldera, a proper spa with hammam and couples' treatment rooms, and one of the better in-house restaurants in the village. The property is strictly adults-only and the service is personal and unhurried. For honeymooners who want the signature Santorini experience — caldera view, sunset terrace, private jacuzzi, spa — without jumping to $1,000+ nightly rates, Pegasus is among the best value picks on the island.
content.best_room: Honeymoon Suite with outdoor jacuzzi and caldera view — cave-style architecture, private sunset-facing terrace, and a hot tub for two. The Superior Cave Suite with private plunge pool is the next-level splurge.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning swim in the infinity pool, walk to Skaros Rock viewpoint (the view from there is astonishing), dinner at Mezzo.

itinerary_7_nights.description: Beach day at Perissa or Red Beach, dinner at Selene in Pyrgos.

caveats: Imerovigli is quieter than Fira or Oia but also has fewer restaurants — plan 2-3 dinners at Mezzo, La Maison, and Anogi.
Not all suites are fully cliff-edge; confirm view angle when booking.
The spa is good but compact — reserve treatments at booking for peak-week stays.
Prices still spike in August; target May-June or September for ideal value.

faqs.a: Yes, 16+. Part of why the atmosphere is so peaceful.
Same caldera and sunset, far fewer tourists, and noticeably more affordable. 15 minutes by car to Oia when you want the scene.
Yes — hammam, couples' treatment room, and well-reviewed therapists. Not a 1,000 sqm pavilion, but genuine quality.

faqs.q: Do all suites have a private jacuzzi?
faqs.a: Most suite categories do. Entry-level rooms don't. Confirm when booking.
Yes — a short walk from the hotel, it offers one of the most dramatic panoramas of the caldera.
Late May to mid-June, and all of September — perfect weather, manageable crowds, better rates.
